mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in aggregate demand signals an expansionary monetary policy that boosts economic growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
A decline in aggregate supply signals a contractionary monetary policy that reduces economic growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
A sustained increase in labor market participation signals an expansionary fiscal policy that boosts economic growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary policy that reduces economic growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
